repos.summary: A Python evaluation harness for structured LLM graders.
A small agent runtime with streamed tools and typed events.

signals.headline: A practical routing test cuts small-model fallback errors
signals.what_changed: A forwarded technical newsletter published a reproducible rubric for deciding when a small model should hand work to a larger one.

signals.headline: Tool-call streaming reaches a stable client release
signals.what_changed: A widely used model client moved streamed tool-call events from preview to its stable release channel.

signals.headline: Rubric-grounded critique improves agreement on smaller models
signals.what_changed: A controlled evaluation found fixed-rubric critique more consistent than freeform self-critique for smaller models.

signals.headline: Median small-model input pricing falls again
signals.what_changed: A public model-price index recorded a 14% month-over-month decrease across its small-model basket.

signals.headline: Pydantic release tightens one structured-output edge case
signals.what_changed: The public release notes describe stricter handling for a nested discriminated-union schema.

signals.headline: A packaging resolver publishes a safer lockfile migration path
signals.what_changed: The resolver now documents a reversible migration path for projects moving from unconstrained requirements to lockfiles.

signals.headline: New retrieval benchmark focuses on multilingual legal archives
signals.what_changed: The benchmark adds five legal corpora and a multilingual citation-recall task.

verdicts.why_it_matters: The routing rubric could reduce unnecessary large-model calls without hiding failures in the morning scoring pass.
verdicts.next_step: Compare the rubric against 20 recent fallback decisions before changing any route.

verdicts.why_it_matters: example-labs/agent-core may be affected because its typed event loop already models partial tool output.
verdicts.next_step: Inspect the stable event shape against the repo's current streamed-tool parser.

verdicts.why_it_matters: example-labs/api-evals may be affected because its current evaluation step already compares structured grader outputs.
verdicts.next_step: Compare rubric-guided and freeform critique on one held-out set.

verdicts.why_it_matters: The change may alter the break-even point for routing routine scoring work to smaller hosted models.
verdicts.next_step: Watch; do nothing until the index holds the lower median for a second weekly sample.

verdicts.why_it_matters: example-labs/api-evals may be affected because it depends on Pydantic for nested structured grader results.
verdicts.next_step: Run the nested-union fixture against the new release in an isolated environment.

verdicts.why_it_matters: The migration guide may reduce lockfile adoption risk across the selected Python repositories.
verdicts.next_step: Read the rollback section and note whether the current CI cache would remain valid.

verdicts.why_it_matters: The subject is interesting but does not map to the selected repos' current work.
verdicts.next_step: Watch; do nothing unless a selected repo adds legal-document retrieval.
